response.justification: This candidate's technical qualifications are exceptional and directly align with all core requirements (TypeScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, clean architecture). However, they are severely overqualified for a junior/mid-level entry IC role—currently a Staff Engineer with 15+ years of experience across senior roles. The career-level misalignment creates substantial flight risk; such candidates typically disengage within 12-18 months when seeking less responsibility or different domain experience without corresponding growth opportunity or title adjustment.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript, React, and Node.js expertise across multiple senior roles; current experience at Staff level far exceeds entry/mid-level technical bar
Proven mastery of clean architecture principles, TDD, and software craftsmanship; demonstrated ability to ship at scale with high-performance constraints
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and LLM integration work, directly relevant to company's near-term product expansion beyond basic job requirements
concerns: Staff Engineer applying for junior/mid-level IC role signals overqualification; high risk of rapid departure or disengagement when role lacks technical complexity and autonomy typically expected at this seniority level
One-year tenure at current Staff role (April 2025–present) creates question about stability and motivation; unclear why stepping backward in career progression
Resume lists Bangalore as base location while employed in Berlin; job requires high on-site presence and geographic/relocation status is unaddressed potential blocker

key_factors.factor: Technical skill alignment across all core requirements
